title: Full Body Pyramid
description: Complete circuit followed by an explosive pyramid for intense full body work

exercises.name: Joint rotations
exercises.instructions: Neck, shoulders, wrists, hips, ankles - slow and controlled

exercises.name: Brisk march in place
exercises.instructions: Walk quickly in place with arm swings

exercises.name: World's greatest stretch
exercises.instructions: Lunge + torso rotation + arm to the sky

exercises.name: Moderate high knees
exercises.instructions: Knees to chest at a moderate pace

exercises.name: Wide push-ups
exercises.instructions: Hands wider than the shoulders, chest focus

exercises.name: Goblet squat (no weight)
exercises.instructions: Hands in front of the chest, sit deep

exercises.name: Shoulder plank
exercises.instructions: In high plank, tap the opposite shoulder alternating

exercises.name: Lateral lunges
exercises.instructions: Big lateral step, bend one leg, the other extended

exercises.name: Leg raises
exercises.instructions: Back on the floor, lift extended legs to vertical

exercises.name: Jump squats
exercises.instructions: Explosive squat with jump, land softly

exercises.name: Standing quad stretch
exercises.instructions: Grab your foot behind you, knee toward the floor

exercises.name: Pigeon stretch
exercises.instructions: Front leg bent in front, back leg extended, lean forward

exercises.name: Scorpion stretch
exercises.instructions: Lying face down, bring the foot to the opposite hand, twisting

exercises.name: Deep breathing
exercises.instructions: Inhale 4s through the nose, hold 4s, exhale 6s through the mouth
